_comment: Model registry — canonical model definitions used by OpenClaw agent sessions.

models.description: High-frequency workhorse: L1 scenes (copilot/mentor/coach/operator), L2 execution (researcher/engineer/publisher/admin). 1M context.
Deep reasoning: researcher (deep analysis), L1 (complex planning). Note: 65K context, no temperature.
Quality gate: reviewer agent — fact_check, code_review, quality_audit. Strong structured output, bilingual.
Creative writing: writer agent — tech_blog, academic_paper, documentation, data_visualization. 128K context, bilingual.
Dev/coding: engineer agent alternative. Same model as review alias.
Text embedding for Mem0 semantic retrieval. 1024 dimensions, bilingual zh/en.
